svg.title: UML Class Diagram — JavaFX client
svg.desc: Client classes: ClientLauncher, SceneRouter, MainMenuView, LobbyView, ArenaView, RankingsView, ArenaRenderer, HudOverlay, GameClient, MandalaArt, MandalaTheme.
svg.text: Scene routing · views · render pipeline · WebSocket transport · theme
Composition (filled diamond) = owns lifecycle · Inheritance (hollow triangle) = implements View · Dashed = dependency / listener.
